hypothesis_en: Mr President, I'm sorry if I haven't heard it, but I may not have read it. I have now read all of them, no one misses their count, so thank you very much for your observation. As I told you, the candidates must be presented to the Deputy Secretary General in the R 0101 office of the Louis Guéig building. I also inform you that the next session will take place tomorrow, Wednesday, 9 to 13 and 15 to 17 The final draft of the agenda has been distributed and is also available on the Internet.
reference_en: perhaps I forgot to read that one out indeed Pierre ~Moscovitchi two hundred and nine Miroslav Ouzký one hundred and eighty-nine (1.12) I= one eight nine I do apologise (3.79) Janusz ~Oniskievik one seven seven Gérard Onesta one six seven Silvia-Yvonne Kaufmann one two one I must have missed that one out I do apologise I think I've read them all now thank (4.13) you very much (1.53) and (1.5) as I said candidacy should be addressed to the Deputy Secretary General Louise Weiss Building Office Number R zero zero one O one the next sitting will take place tomorrow Wednesday from nine to one PM and from three to h= five thirty the agenda will be adopted at the beginning of the sitting and the definitive draft agenda has been given out (1.34) you can also find it of course on the Intranet (1.54) so now colleagues the sitting is suspended
source_es: (3.59) discúlpeme si no lo he leído quizás que no lo haya leído Pierre Moscovici eran doscientos nueve Miroslav Ouzký ciento ochenta y nueve (1.14) disculpe ciento ochenta y nueve a continuación voy a c= seguir leyendo hasta el final Janusz ~Onieskievik ciento setenta y siete Gérard Onesta ciento sesenta y siete y Silvia-Yvonne Kaufmann ciento veinte y uno ahora he leído a todos nadie echa a faltar su recuento pues muchas gracias por su observación (1.09) como les decía las candidaturas deberán presentarse al Secretario general adjunto en el despacho R cero cero ciento uno del edificio Louise ~Gweish les comunico también que la próxima sesión tendrá lugar mañana miércoles de nueve a trece y de quince a diecisiete y treinta horas el orden del día se aprobará al inicio de la sesión el proyecto definitivo del orden del día se ha distribuido y también se encuentra disposibl= disponible en Intranet señoras y señores diputados (1.06) se levanta la sesión
